name: cc-rules
description: Comprehensive behavioral enforcement for Claude Code: anti-stall rules + mechanical hooks that physically block shortcuts. Includes reasoning-before-edit, dotnet build auto-verify, PixelLab credit guard, write-content verification, .tscn validation, shallow response detection, and 4 LLM guard agents.

plugins.name: cc-forever-rules
plugins.description: Comprehensive behavioral enforcement: anti-stall, completion verification, simplicity, surgical changes, 98+ failure mode patterns, PLUS mechanical hooks (reasoning-before-edit, dotnet build auto-verify, PixelLab guard, write-content check, .tscn/.tres validation, shallow response detection, Skill enforcement) and 4 LLM guard agents. Derived from real interaction failures and systemically categorized.
